docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY XU, DAN (PASSENGER OF AUTO ACCIDENT) AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, ALEJANDRO (WHITE TRUCK DRIVER AT THE BACK) MARIO SUSTAYMRS GROUP INC, DBA SERVICE BROS TRANSPORT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF XU, DAN (PASSENGER OF AUTO ACCIDENT) ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
